etymology.description: 山(山) (shān, "mountain") + 幺(么) (yāo, "tiny") = phonetically resembles 幺 (yāo) and semantically relates to mountain -> high and steep
etymology.interpretation: The character 崾 combines the semantic element 山(山) (shān, "mountain") representing height with the phonetic element 幺(么) (yāo, "tiny"), indicating its sound. This results in the meaning connected to mountainous heights, describing something as high and steep.
